tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT p.number, p.closes_linear FROM github_pull_requests p WHERE p.state = 'merged' AND p.closes_linear IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT l.state FROM linear_issues l WHERE l.id = p.closes_linear) != 'done'"}
